programme.desc: Kyle Rittenhouse shoots and kills two people and maims a third during a Black Lives Matter protest in Kenosha, Wisconsin; the 17-year-old, armed with an AR-15, claims he acted in self-defense because he feared for his life.

programme.title: Victim to Verdict
